mapper.insert: insert into SYS_OPER_LOG ( OPER_ID, TITLE, BUSINESS_TYPE, METHOD, REQUEST_METHOD, OPER_TYPE, OPER_USER_NAME, OPER_USER_ID, OPER_URL, OPER_IP, OPER_LOCATION, STATUS, ERROR_MSG, OPER_TIME, OPER_PARAM, JSON_RESULT, Cost_Time ) values ( #{operId}, #{title}, #{businessType}, #{method}, #{requestMethod}, #{operType}, #{operUserName}, #{operUserId}, #{operUrl}, #{operIp}, #{operLocation}, #{status}, #{errorMsg, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operTime}, #{operParam}, #{jsonResult}, #{costTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT OPER_ID, TITLE, BUSINESS_TYPE, METHOD, REQUEST_METHOD, OPER_TYPE, OPER_USER_NAME, OPER_USER_ID, OPER_URL, OPER_IP, OPER_LOCATION, STATUS, ERROR_MSG, OPER_TIME, OPER_PARAM, JSON_RESULT, Cost_Time FROM SYS_OPER_LOG WHERE OPER_ID=#{operId} ORDER BY OPER_ID
